query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales) as total_vendas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM proposals) as total_propostas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions) as total_comissoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_empresas;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales) as total_vendas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM proposals) as total_propostas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions) as total_comissoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as total_empresas;
